title: Securing the Bomb 2006
summary: The latest report in the ongoing MTA / NTI collaboration, Securing the Bomb 2006, finds that even though the gap between the threat of nuclear terrorism and the response has narrowed in recent years, there remains an unacceptable danger that terrorists might succeed in their quest to get and use a nuclear bomb.
body: Visit the report's online companion on the Nuclear Threat Initiative's website and read the press release (.pdf).
